@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor(loadUser)
C: same_validation_order
P: async_await
V: next(err)
R: ! minimal_behavioral_change
A: function(loadUser) ∧ async ∧ try ∧ if(id) ∧ next(newError) ∧ await ∧ db.findUser ∧ if(err) ∧ return ∧ next(err) ∧ if(user) ∧ return ∧ next(newError) ∧ await ∧ audit.log ∧ next(logErr) ∧ await ∧ cache.set ∧ next(cacheErr) ∧ next(null,user)

[AUDIT]
Refactor loadUser while preserving same_validation_order.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: refactor(loadUser)

P: validate_id → find_user → audit_log → cache_set
V: missing_id ∧ not_found ∧ db_error ∧ log_error ∧ cache_error
R: ! id_null ∧ ! user_not_found ∧ ! audit_failure ∧ ! cache_failure
